title: Minerals Technologies Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend
author: Globe Newswire
description: Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE:MTX) announced that its Board of Directors declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per share, payable on June 18, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 2, 2026. The company is a global specialty minerals manufacturer with 4,000 employees across 34 countries and reported 2025 global sales of $2.1 billion.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The declaration of a regular quarterly dividend demonstrates the company's financial stability and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. Consistent dividend payments are typically viewed positively by investors as they indicate confidence in the company's cash flow generation and business performance.

title: Minerals Technologies Inc. Announces 2026 First Quarter Financial Results
author: Na
description: Minerals Technologies Inc. (MTX) reported first quarter 2026 earnings per share of $1.17 ($1.38 excluding special items), representing a 21% increase year-over-year. The company achieved 11% sales growth to $547 million, driven by double-digit growth across multiple businesses in both the Consumer & Specialties and Engineered Solutions segments. Management expects momentum to continue through 2026 despite geopolitical challenges affecting global energy costs.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company demonstrated strong financial performance with 21% EPS growth year-over-year, 11% sales growth, and double-digit growth across multiple business segments. Both operating segments showed healthy growth momentum, and management expressed confidence in continued momentum through 2026. The company successfully navigated geopolitical challenges and higher energy costs through operational adjustments.

title: Minerals Technologies Inc. Announces Participation at Upcoming Investor Conferences
author: Na
description: Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE: MTX) announced its participation in four major investor conferences scheduled for March 2026, including presentations by its Chairman and CEO Douglas T. Dietrich and CFO Erik Aldag at J.P. Morgan conferences and a Gabelli Funds symposium. The company reported 2025 global sales of $2.1 billion with 4,000 employees across 34 countries.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is actively engaging with investors through multiple high-profile conferences and maintaining regular dividend declarations, indicating financial stability and confidence in business operations. The participation in prestigious financial conferences and continued investor relations activities suggest positive market positioning.

title: Gabelli Hosts 17th Annual Specialty Chemicals Symposium
author: Na
description: Gabelli Funds will host its 17th Annual Specialty Chemicals Symposium on March 19, 2026, in Midtown Manhattan, featuring discussions with leading specialty chemicals companies on industry dynamics and trends. The event will include one-on-one meetings with management teams and webcast access for remote attendees.

title: Minerals Technologies Inc. Declares Quarterly Dividend
author: Globe Newswire
description: Minerals Technologies Inc. (NYSE:MTX) announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per share, payable on March 6, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 13, 2026. The specialty minerals company serves global consumer and industrial markets with 4,000 employees across 34 countries and reported 2024 sales of $2.1 billion.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company declared a regular quarterly dividend, demonstrating financial stability and commitment to returning capital to shareholders. Dividend declarations are typically viewed positively as they indicate confidence in the company's cash flow and financial health.
